hooks.description: Refuse rm -rf /, bench drop-site, git push --force on protected branches, DROP/DELETE without WHERE.
Inspect URLs/hosts; refuse if matching a site flagged is_production=1 in .frappe-stack/config.json.
Scan generated Python for ignore_permissions=True / allow_guest=True / hardcoded role checks; refuse with a citation.
Scan generated content for AKIA*, Bearer literals, api_key=, password=, frappe site_config secrets.
Scan generated Python for f-string / .format() / % SQL; refuse, suggest frappe.qb or %s parameterized.
Append a JSONL row to .frappe-stack/audit.jsonl with timestamp, tool, args summary, result. Independent of the on-site Stack Audit Log; this is the local-side log.

Coach PM prompts at typing time. Block on real PII (Aadhaar / PAN / Indian mobile), DROP TABLE / TRUNCATE, force-merge / bypass-review intent, force-push to protected branches. Inject hidden coaching context for vague build intents (suggest matching slash command), production-write intents (redirect to /frappe-stack:promote), permission-bypass language, elevated fieldtype mentions, schema renames, A/B intents without a question, multi-blueprint features without a spec, integration setups.
If HEARTBEAT.md hasn't been updated this session and a phase transition occurred (detected via PLAN.md decision-register changes), prompt the user to stamp it.
